title: Section 136
content: (1) Save as otherwise provided in sub-section (2), the finding and sentence of a Summary Assam Rifles Court shall not require to be confirmed, but may be carried out forthwith. (2) If the officer holding the trial is of the rank of Deputy Commandant or of a rank declared under clause (a) of sub-section (5) of section 96 as equivalent thereto or of a lower rank and has held such rank for less than five years, he shall not, except on active duty, carry into effect any sentence, until it has received the approval of an officer not below the rank of a Deputy Inspector-General.
